title: Remove project news/updates section and menu tab

requirements.summary: Remove the ProjectNewsUpdates component from the main App.tsx layout
acceptanceCriteria: The ProjectNewsUpdates section no longer appears on the main page
App.tsx no longer imports or renders the ProjectNewsUpdates component

file_operations.description: Remove the import statement for ProjectNewsUpdates component and remove the <ProjectNewsUpdates /> component from the JSX layout so it no longer renders on the main page

requirements.summary: Remove the 'News & Updates' navigation item from the TopNavigation dropdown menu
acceptanceCriteria: The 'News & Updates' menu item no longer appears in the TopNavigation dropdown
All other menu items remain functional

file_operations.description: Remove the 'News & Updates' menu item from the dropdown menu items array, ensuring the scroll handler and menu item reference are removed while preserving all other navigation functionality
